name: Chocolate Cheesecake 2
recipeIngredient: 1 package Chocolate pudding and pie filling
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine graham cracker crumbs, sugar, and melted butter. Press on the bottom and sides of a greased 9-inch springform pan.
2. In a saucepan, combine pudding mix, sugar, and milk. Add chocolate. Cook and stir over medium heat until the mixture comes to a full boil. Remove from heat. Cover the surface with waxed paper and set aside.
3. Beat cream cheese until fluffy. Beat in yolks, vanilla, salt, and pudding mixture. Fold in egg whites (beat egg whites first).
4. Pour the batter over the crumbs in the pan.
5. Bake on the lowest rack at 425°F for about 35 minutes or until the center is set lightly when touched. Cool for 4 hours.
6. Spread top with sour cream.
